title: Bingo the Golden Retriever Brought Home a Live Armadillo
script: The dog brought home WHAT? Meet Bingo — a golden retriever from Allen, Oklahoma, who decided last Thursday that the family needed a new pet. Specifically, a live armadillo. Bingo walked through the front door carrying the armadillo in his mouth. The family's home security camera caught the whole thing: kids running, adults screaming, absolute chaos on the front lawn. Owner Alycia Napier said the family eventually managed to coax Bingo into going back outside — at which point Bingo dropped the armadillo, and the armadillo immediately scurried into a neighbor's yard. So it's now the neighbor's problem. The armadillo appears to be fine. Bingo, for his part, seemed very proud. Who's walking around with a live armadillo in their yard right now — the neighbor, or you?
